commands.result: Confirmed local DB tables include records, corridors, routes, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, evidence_refs, and blocks_fts.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select record_kind, count(*) as n from records where record_kind in ('corridor','route') group by record_kind; select kind, count(*) as n from identity_aliases where kind in ('corridor','route') group by kind; select kind, count(*) as n from do_not_merge where kind in ('corridor','route') group by kind;"
commands.result: Found 278 corridor records, 421 route records, 38 corridor aliases, 45 route aliases, 5 corridor do-not-merge rows, and 34 route do-not-merge rows.
Prior Codex prep files through identity093 had corridor/route proposals for batch093 corridor pairs and earlier route proposals; none of the batch096 alias_ids appeared.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select kind,alias,target from identity_aliases where kind='route' and alias in (<batch096 aliases>);"
commands.result: Returned no rows; none of the batch096 alias_ids are already mapped in identity_aliases.
Returned no rows for the batch096 BM2/BM3/BM4 alias or target families; none are already mapped in merges.json.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select kind, record_id_a, record_id_b from do_not_merge where kind='route' and (record_id_a in (<batch096 records>) or record_id_b in (<batch096 records>));"
commands.result: Returned no rows; none of the selected alias/target records participate in route do-not-merge guards.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select r.record_id,r.display_name,rt.route_id,rt.route_type_normalized,json_extract(r.payload,'$.service_variant') as service_variant,r.primary_source_id from records r join routes rt on rt.record_id=r.record_id where r.record_id in (<batch096 records>) order by rt.route_id,r.record_id;"
commands.result: All selected records materialize as route records. BM2 records have route_id BM2 and express service_variant; BM3 records have route_id BM3 and express service_variant; BM4 records have route_id BM4 and express service_variant.
